has_landing_utm.q: Does the product have a live landing page with UTM analytics (signup or trial tracked)?

icp_reads_dev_newsletters.q: Is your ICP developers, eng managers, or technical founders who subscribe to niche dev newsletters (React, JS, DevOps, etc.)?

budget_check.q: Is monthly sponsorship budget ≥$1,500 for at least 3 test slots?

prior_sponsor_data.q: Do you have media kits or overlap scores for ≥5 niche newsletters?

aggressive_window.q: Is first sponsor send ≥14 days out with creative brief + UTM scheme locked?

have_email_list.q: Do you have ≥500 own subscribers to seed social proof or founder story for sponsor copy?
